routes.name: Dashboard
routes.description: High-level summary of tenant health, service indicators, and overall Webex environment posture.

routes.name: Licenses
routes.description: Displays license allocation, overages, unused subscriptions, and compliance posture.

routes.name: Call Detail Records (CDR)
routes.description: Detailed call history including timestamps, duration, endpoints, and reporting insights.

routes.name: Analytics
routes.description: Call quality, packet loss, MOS scoring, and media performance analytics.

routes.name: Calling Insight
routes.description: Aggregated calling performance scoring and SLA trend visualization.

routes.name: Devices
routes.description: Webex registered devices, offline detection, and endpoint inventory.

routes.name: PSTN
routes.description: PSTN architecture including trunks, routing, emergency callback numbers.

routes.name: Incidents
routes.description: Active and historical incidents affecting services.

routes.name: Maintenance
routes.description: Scheduled maintenance windows and planned service updates.

routes.name: Observability
routes.description: Unified monitoring dashboard combining health, PSTN scoring, and SLA indicators.

routes.name: Support
routes.description: Submit and track support cases directly through the portal.
